---
title: "Notes from Nature Vetting"
---

Load codings

```{r}

library(stringr)
library(dplyr)

nfn <- read.csv("data/nfn_vetting.csv")
colnames(nfn) <- c("subject_id","code_str","filename")
nfn$img_id <- str_replace(nfn$filename,".png","")
nfn$black_present <- grepl("Black", nfn$code_str, fixed = TRUE)
nfn <- select(nfn, c("img_id","black_present"))

d <- merge(d,nfn,by="img_id",all.x=TRUE)

d$black_present_numeric <- as.numeric(d$black_present)
cor(d$black_present,d$percent_dark_or_darker_than_0.25,use="complete.obs")

cor.test(d$black_present_numeric,d$percent_dark_or_darker_than_0.3,use="complete.obs")

```
